    <item>
        <guid>nba528126</guid>
        <title>Naji Marshall: Exits early Tuesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/naji-marshall-5204</link>
        <description>Marshall (undisclosed) exited to the locker room in the fourth quarter of Tuesday's 116-103 loss to the Clippers and did not return, finishing with six points (3-10 FG, 0-1 3Pt), three steals and two rebounds across 20 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 9:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528125</guid>
        <title>Naji Marshall: Exits to locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/naji-marshall-5204</link>
        <description>Marshall (undisclosed) exited to the locker room in the fourth quarter of Tuesday's game against the Clippers, Grant Afseth of DallasHoopsJournal.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 9:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528120</guid>
        <title>Jayson Tatum: Playing Thursday, likely out Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jayson-tatum-4108</link>
        <description>Tatum said after Tuesday's 113-102 win over the Hornets that he will play Thursday against the Knicks, meaning he will likely sit out Friday's game against the Pelicans, Zack Cox of the Boston Herald reports. He finished Tuesday's game with 23 points (8-15 FG, 3-7 3Pt, 4-5 FT), five rebounds, four assists and one steal in 39 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 8:27:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528117</guid>
        <title>Julian Reese: Double-doubles in blowout loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/julian-reese-6653</link>
        <description>Reese amassed 17 points (8-14 FG, 1-4 FT), 11 rebounds, four assists, two blocks and three steals over 36 minutes during Tuesday's 129-98 loss to Chicago.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 7:58:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528114</guid>
        <title>Rob Dillingham: Nets career-high 26 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/rob-dillingham-6255</link>
        <description>Dillingham racked up 26 points (9-15 FG, 5-8 3Pt, 3-4 FT), seven rebounds, two assists and two steals over 27 minutes during Tuesday's 129-98 victory over the Wizards.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 7:56:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
